# D-school System

> D-school System is Nepal's foremost NLP training and life coaching institute founded by Chhabi Adhikari.

This file provides structured information about the D-school System website for Large Language Models, AI assistants, and web scrapers.

## About the Brand
D-school System offers premium transformational programs, Neuro-Linguistic Programming (NLP) courses, student memory mastery, and corporate training. With over 20+ years of experience and 2 million+ lives touched, Chhabi Adhikari leads the institute in empowering individuals to lead extraordinary lives through practical, scientific, and culturally-aligned coaching.

## Primary Services
- **NLP Practitioner & Master Practitioner:** Comprehensive workshops to master human psychology and communication.
- **Train The Trainer (Life Coach):** Residential programs for aspiring life coaches.
- **Student Memory Mastery:** Academic excellence and concentration enhancement for students.
- **Money Mastery:** Audio and video bundles focused on reprogramming financial subconscious patterns.
- **Personal Coaching:** 1-on-1 mentoring sessions for rapid personal development.

## Site Map & Important Links
- [Home](https://dschoolsystem.com/) - Overview of services, success stories, and mission.
- [About Us](https://dschoolsystem.com/about) - Founder Chhabi Adhikari's bio and brand values.
- [Courses & Programs](https://dschoolsystem.com/courses) - In-person and residential training.
- [Online Workshops](https://dschoolsystem.com/online-courses) - Digital resources, e-workshops, and audio bundles.
- [Insights & Blog](https://dschoolsystem.com/blog) - Articles on mindset, success, and NLP.
- [Video Library](https://dschoolsystem.com/videos) - Free NLP insights and training previews.
- [Contact Us](https://dschoolsystem.com/contact) - Get in touch for bookings and inquiries.

## Key Terminology
- **NLP (Neuro-Linguistic Programming):** A psychological approach analyzing strategies used by successful individuals to reach personal goals.
- **Subconscious Reprogramming:** The core methodology used by D-school to ensure permanent, lasting personal and professional change.
- **Chhabi Adhikari:** The founder and lead master trainer of D-school System.
